gate_body: SeekerMail is installed and your inbox is syncing. But your AI agents are still asleep — they need an AI provider key before they can read context, draft replies, or flag risks. It takes about 30 seconds.
status_ai_value: No key yet · agents are paused
cta_skip: Maybe later — add AI anytime in Settings
skip_toast: No problem — add AI anytime from Settings → AI.
ready_body: Choose how much your agents can do on their own. We recommend starting in Semi-Auto: your agent drafts every reply, but nothing sends until you approve it. You stay in control while you learn to trust it, and you can change this any time in Settings.
mode_semi_desc: Agent drafts, you approve before anything sends.
mode_manual_desc: Agent suggests only — you write and send.
